title: Excel Masterclass Builds Digital Capability Across the Group
content:
Our Group HR team hosted an advanced Excel program for team members from multiple business units, reinforcing our culture of continuous learning and workplace excellence.

This comprehensive training program brought together employees from various divisions to enhance their digital skills and analytical capabilities. The masterclass covered advanced Excel functions, data analysis techniques, and best practices for workplace productivity.

By investing in our people's development, we strengthen our ability to deliver exceptional service to our partners and maintain our position as a leader in Kuwait's business landscape.
excerpt: Our Group HR team hosted an advanced Excel program for team members from multiple business units, reinforcing our culture of continuous learning and workplace excellence.

title: Al Bahar Group Engages Future Talent at National Career Fairs
content:
By participating in leading career fairs, we showcased our values, culture and diverse career paths – and connected with bright graduates seeking to shape their future with us.

Our team engaged with hundreds of talented individuals, sharing insights about our business verticals and the opportunities available across technology, consumer goods, shipping, travel, and retail sectors.

These events allow us to build relationships with the next generation of professionals and demonstrate our commitment to developing local talent in Kuwait.
excerpt: By participating in leading career fairs, we showcased our values, culture and diverse career paths – and connected with bright graduates seeking to shape their future with us.

title: Recognised by Global Technology Partners for Outstanding Performance
content:
Our technology division continues to receive regional recognition for expanding partner presence in Kuwait, accelerating adoption of new innovations and delivering strong market results.

This recognition reflects our team's dedication to excellence and our ability to successfully represent leading international technology brands in the Kuwait market.

Through strategic partnerships and innovative solutions, we help organizations work smarter and more securely while maintaining the highest standards of service and support.
excerpt: Our technology division continues to receive regional recognition for expanding partner presence in Kuwait, accelerating adoption of new innovations and delivering strong market results.

To make matters worse many will still be recovering from their Christmas spending. So how can you make today

Vast numbers of employees now work remotely, and it's too late to develop a set of remote-work policies if you didn't already have one. But there are ways to make the remote-work experience productive and engaging for employees
